item.title: F-003d: Interactive Elements (Checkboxes and Links)
item.intent: Task list checkboxes must be tappable and links must be clickable — these are the elements that make the rich view feel alive, not static
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-003 (Core Rendering). Task list checkboxes: rendered as interactive checkboxes. Tapping toggles the checkbox AND updates the underlying markdown (- [ ] to - [x]). Links: rendered as styled tappable text. Tap opens URL in system browser. Long-press shows URL preview and copy option. Link text styled with color and subtle underline.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a task list checkbox toggles it and updates the markdown source
Toggling a checkbox is a single undo step
Tapping a link opens the URL in Safari/system browser
Long-pressing a link shows the URL and a copy option
Links to relative files open the file in easy-markdown (if .md) or system handler
